summary:
Given a string s, find the longest contiguous run of characters within it that reads the same forwards and backwards.

Return that longest palindromic substring. If more than one substring of the maximum length exists, any of them is acceptable.

examples.explanation: "bb" is the longest substring that is a palindrome.
The entire string is already a palindrome.

constraints: s consists of digits and English letters
A single character counts as a palindrome
Any valid answer is accepted when several share the maximum length
